steps.body: **Power** is how fast energy is transferred: **P = W / Δt** (or **P = F·v** when force and velocity align). Same work, less time → more power.

steps.prompt: You do **120 J** of work in **4 s**. Drag **P** (average power).
A motor lifts a **4 kg** crate **2.5 m** at **constant speed** in **5 s**. Drag the **P** of the motor.
hints: At constant speed, W = mgh (no ΔKE).

steps.prompt: Same **98 J** of work, but done in **2 s** instead. Drag **P**.
hints: Same work, shorter time → higher power.

steps.title: Lesson complete!
steps.body: You connected work, time, and power — the rate energy flows.
